title: Translate vetted maternal danger signs in pregnancy guidance into Amharic
context: Community health workers need vetted maternal danger signs in pregnancy guidance in Amharic. Use a vetted public-health source (e.g. WHO/MoH); verify the source licence permits translation/derivatives and record it — do NOT assume CC-BY. Include the required source attribution and any mandated translation disclaimer.
objective: Produce an accurate Amharic translation of vetted maternal danger signs in pregnancy guidance, preserving medical terminology.
acceptanceCriteria: Reviewed by a qualified Amharic-speaking reviewer (risk-tier: medium)
Source licence verified to permit translation + attribution/disclaimer recorded (not relicensed as CC-BY unless the source allows)
